title: Neon Genesis Evangelion Angel Adam 2019 Fake imdb listing
display_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion Angel Adam 2019 Fake imdb listing
wikitext:
[]: Neon Genesis Evangelion Angel Adam (2019) - Fake imdb listing?             Quote Post by richardboegli » Sat Dec 05, 2015 9:59 am Hi, It was either here or Evangelion Discussion? I just rewatched Evangelion 1.11 and went to check something on IMDB and found this listing: Neon Genesis Evangelion Angel Adam (2019)? It look a bit suspicious to me as the only named person is Marcos Arias and the linked website on the IMDB page looks fake. Take a look for yourself: http://www.imdb.com/title/tt4841478/ Thanks.

[]: Re: Neon Genesis Evangelion Angel Adam (2019) - Fake imdb listing?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Dec 05, 2015 1:35 pm Something coming out of the blue on imdb without any previous talk on Japanese sites is going to be bogus. Though this wouldn't be the first time some fan with more enthusiasm than capability has proposed doing their own NGE film; there was one about a decade back, which of course went nowhere. Here's some of what survives .

[]: Re: Neon Genesis Evangelion Angel Adam (2019) - Fake imdb listing?             Quote Post by richardboegli » Sat Dec 05, 2015 10:51 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Something coming out of the blue on imdb without any previous talk on Japanese sites is going to be bogus. Though this wouldn't be the first time some fan with more enthusiasm than capability has proposed doing their own NGE film; there was one about a decade back, which of course went nowhere. Here's some of what survives .

[]: Re: Neon Genesis Evangelion Angel Adam (2019) - Fake imdb listing?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Dec 05, 2015 10:59 pm This guy... he's directed a TV episode of something, as well as written a few other things. A lot of them are simply short film, and I've never heard of the TV series he's worked on. This doesn't being any legitimacy to his film. After all, fan films have IMDB listings too.

[]: Re: Neon Genesis Evangelion Angel Adam (2019) - Fake imdb listing?             Quote Post by Dima » Mon Dec 07, 2015 9:37 am Probably it's either fake or a fan project (though i don't know if imdb can lists fan projects). Despite all that.... cool title.
